vocab.meaning_vi: vấn đề cản trở công việc
vocab.example: I have a blocker with the payment API — can someone help me after standup?
vocab.example_vi: Tôi đang bị vướng ở API thanh toán — ai giúp tôi sau standup được không?

vocab.example: The login feature is on track for Friday's release.
vocab.example_vi: Tính năng đăng nhập đang đúng tiến độ cho bản phát hành thứ Sáu.

vocab.meaning_vi: theo dõi / trao đổi tiếp sau
vocab.example: Let's follow up on this after the meeting.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta trao đổi tiếp việc này sau cuộc họp nhé.

vocab.example: The deadline for this sprint is next Wednesday.
vocab.example_vi: Hạn chót của sprint này là thứ Tư tuần sau.

vocab.example: My estimate for this task is about two days.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi ước lượng task này mất khoảng hai ngày.

vocab.example: I will hand over the ticket to the QA team today.
vocab.example_vi: Hôm nay tôi sẽ bàn giao ticket cho team QA.

vocab.example: Fixing the login bug is our top priority this week.
vocab.example_vi: Sửa lỗi đăng nhập là ưu tiên hàng đầu của chúng ta tuần này.

vocab.example: Can you give us a quick update on the database migration?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn cập nhật nhanh tình hình migration database được không?

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: Good morning everyone. Let's start our standup. Linh, can you go first?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Sure. Yesterday I finished the login page and fixed two small bugs.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Today I will start working on the user profile screen.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Yes, one. I need access to the staging database, but I'm still waiting for permission.

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: Okay, I will follow up with the infra team after this meeting.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Thank you. That would really help.

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: No problem. Let's keep the profile screen on track for Friday.

options: The login page and two bug fixes
She is waiting for database access

questions.q: What will Nam do after the meeting?
options: Follow up with the infra team

shadowing: Yesterday I finished the login page and fixed two small bugs before lunch.
Today I will start working on the user profile screen for the new release.
I have a blocker — I'm still waiting for access to the staging database.
My estimate for this task is about two days, maybe a bit longer.
Let's follow up on this together right after the standup meeting ends.

interview.question: Tell me about yourself.
tips_vi: Nói 60–90 giây: hiện tại → kinh nghiệm nổi bật → vì sao phù hợp vị trí này
Đừng kể lan man tiểu sử; tập trung kinh nghiệm liên quan công việc
Kết thúc bằng lý do bạn hứng thú với vị trí đang ứng tuyển
interview.sample_answer: I'm a software developer with five years of experience, mainly in web applications. In my current company, I work on a payment system used by more than ten thousand users every day. I enjoy solving problems and working closely with people from different teams, like design and QA. Recently I led a small project to improve our checkout page, and we reduced loading time by forty percent, which made customers much happier. I also mentor two junior developers on my team, and I really enjoy helping them grow their skills. Now I'm looking for a new challenge in an international environment where I can keep learning, and I believe this position is a great fit for my skills and my goals for the next few years.

interview.question: Why do you want to work for our company?
tips_vi: Nêu 2–3 điểm cụ thể về công ty (sản phẩm, công nghệ, văn hoá) — tránh câu chung chung
Nối điểm mạnh của bạn với nhu cầu của công ty
Thể hiện bạn đã tìm hiểu trước về công ty
interview.sample_answer: There are three main reasons. First, I really like your product — I have used it myself for over a year, and I can see how it helps people work better every day. Second, your company uses modern technologies that I want to grow with, especially cloud services and automated testing, which I have only started learning recently. And third, I read several reviews about your team culture, and I like that you focus on continuous learning and sharing knowledge between teams instead of working alone. I believe I can contribute my experience in web development from my current job, and at the same time grow as an engineer here by learning from your senior team members and taking on new challenges.
